---
name: 🐛 Bug report
about: Something isn't working the way you expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

**Before you start:** please reproduce on the latest release, and **do not paste
real personal or genealogical data** — use made-up names/dates in screenshots.

## What happened?

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See the problem

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, add screenshots or log output (with personal data removed).

## Environment

- TreeMonk version: <!-- e.g. 0.18.1 -->
- OS: <!-- e.g. Windows 11 / Ubuntu 24.04 -->
- Install type: <!-- Setup.exe / AppImage / .deb / built from source -->

## Additional context

Anything else that might help (when it started, frequency, a recent import, etc.).
